penalties.description: The marked circle was not completely freed from the gauze.

consensus_score.reasoning: Both models detected the core cutting phases but disagreed on completion status. GPT-4o's assessment of incomplete circle is more defensible given the fundamental task requirement. Claude's line deviation penalties are dropped as they conflict with the incomplete circle finding. Timing averaged between the two estimates.

disagreements.rationale: Both timing estimates were reasonable; averaged to balance the uncertainty in frame-based timing estimation.

claude_value.description: Multiple visible deviations from the marked circle line

gpt_value.description: The marked circle was not completely freed from the gauze

disagreements.rationale: Incomplete circle is a fundamental task failure that takes precedence over line deviations. If the circle is not freed, line precision becomes secondary to the completion requirement.
If the circle was not completely freed as indicated by the incomplete_circle penalty, then circle_release phase was not successfully completed.
